free_text: Thin sample of fissionable material placed
NaI crystal surrounded by NaI anti-
Compton shield placed at a distance of 70 cm from
sample used for gamma ray detection.Surface barrier
detector was used for fission fragment detection
of prompt fission neutrons. Surface barrier
detector provided time reference for fission
events. Time resolution was better than 4 ns
SD: EN moved from Subent 1 to Subents 2,3.
REACTION code in Subents 2,3 was corrected according
OS. Data point in sub.2 corrected,
